name: figma-to-code
description: Full 15-skill pipeline: extract design context, sync tokens, generate components, verify stories, deploy preview, push back to Figma, inspect nodes, run drift reports, apply themes, link components, check parity, and annotate deploys.
author: systemix

mcp: Figma Console MCP (mcp__figma-console__ or mcp__claude_ai_Figma_Console__) — for write-back skills
tools: Figma Desktop on port 3845 (for /figma-inspect write ops)
